title: ChargePoint Holdings Inc (CHPT) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue and Improved Margins
text: ChargePoint reported Q1 2024 earnings with strong revenue performance. Revenue reached $130 million, up 59% year-on-year and above the midpoint of previously announced guidance of $122 million to $132 million, with Q1 being notably the company's second largest quarter ever. Europe represented 20% of the business and was performing strong, while fleet grew 200% year-over-year. Revenue was at the high end of guidance range and non-GAAP gross margin sequentially improved two points to 25%. The company achieved a 59% year-over-year growth rate in the first quarter. For the first time in their history, Europe delivered over 20% of ChargePoint's quarterly revenue, and Q1's fleet billings more than doubled year-over-year. For the second quarter of fiscal 2024, management expected revenue of $148 million to $158 million, up 41% year-on-year at the midpoint. The company was committed to being adjusted EBITDA positive in Q4 of calendar 2024 and remained committed to being cash flow positive.
